title: Razorpay UPI Circle Platform Config
description: Platform-level configuration for the com.razorpay.upi.circle payment handler. Unlike UPI Intent (which requires deep-link capability), UPI Circle requires the platform to hold a valid delegate_id and integrate with Razorpay to fetch one-time cryptograms before each Complete Checkout.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment. Must match the business config environment.
